scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:lan: concurrently -n web,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:web:lan" "npm run dev:backend:lan"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n web,backend,desktop -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.package:desktop: npm run build --workspaces --if-present && npm run package -w @bubble-town/desktop
